title: Japanese Stir-Fry with Savory Sauce
description: A simple and flavorful stir-fry dish made with savory sauce, crunchy vegetables, and your choice of protein. Serve over steamed rice for a delicious and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Protein of choice (chicken, beef, tofu, etc.)

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add protein and cook until browned, then set aside.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add crunchy vegetables and cook until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together savory sauce, soy sauce, and 1 tablespoon water.
Pour sauce over vegetables and stir to combine.
Return protein to the skillet and stir to coat with sauce.
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions, if desired.
